market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Inside Cardano's 'Van Rossum' hard fork, and what it means for users
articles.description: The Van Rossem hard fork moved Cardano to version 11 on Saturday. And for the first time, Cardano's community voted in the upgrade, not the company that built it.

articles.title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
articles.description: This restructuring is part of a strategy to build a full-stack payments platform following the company's acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx.

articles.title: Hut 8 surges on $9.8 billion AI data-center lease, lifting compute sector
articles.description: The long-term deal sparked a rebound in AI compute stocks after investors questioned demand for new data center capacity.

articles.title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over
articles.description: Renowned trading analyst Peter Brandt says investing in Bitcoin today, will pay off much better in two to three years than buying AI stocks at current prices.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
articles.description: The company added just 7,430 ETH, worth about $14 million, last week as it nears its goal to corner 5% of Ethereum's supply.

articles.title: Strategy raises $263.5M through MSTR sales, holds 843,775 Bitcoin
articles.description: Strategy boosted its cash reserve to $3.225 billion after selling MSTR shares, while investors weighed the value of its STRC preferred stock.

articles.title: Saylor's Strategy raises cash reserves to $3.2 billion, leaving bitcoin holdings unchanged
articles.description: For the second consecutive week, the firm kept bitcoin holdings steady, choosing to use the raised capital to boost cash for paying dividends on its preferred stock.

articles.title: StrictlyVC returns to New York City September 10 to celebrate a huge year for the city’s startup community
articles.description: For the first time since 2024, StrictlyVC is coming back to New York City — and we're bringing the kind of access you’d expect from an under-wraps event to the whole startup, VC, and dealmaking community.

articles.title: Hyperliquid sets 500,000 HYPE stake for permissionless prediction market deployers
articles.description: Hyperliquid plans to require developers to stake 500,000 HYPE, worth about $30.4 million, to deploy permissionless prediction markets under HIP-4.

articles.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
articles.description: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

articles.title: Zilliqa asks exchanges to pause ZIL transfers after suspected cold wallet theft
articles.description: Zilliqa said exchanges paused ZIL deposits and withdrawals after an exchange partner’s cold wallet was compromised, with the amount stolen still undisclosed.

articles.title: Brazil’s securities regulator sets up task force with 60-day deadline for tokenization proposal
articles.description: The framework will address critical issues like official ownership records, private key custody, transaction reversibility and system liability.

articles.title: A bitcoin 'volmageddon' may be brewing, key indicator suggests
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 20, 2026

articles.title: Bank of Korea prepares for live CBDC transactions with 9 banks in September
articles.description: Major banking heavyweights join a massive blockchain network test that will allow retail consumers to trade tokenized won freely across commercial lines.

articles.title: Crypto institutions look beyond audits as trust signals falter: Hacken
articles.description: Institutional due diligence is shifting toward continuous monitoring, signer controls and incident readiness after operational failures accounted for most crypto losses.

articles.title: Capital B approves 10-for-1 reverse stock split to broaden investor base
articles.description: Europe’s second-biggest Bitcoin treasury company said the September reverse stock split should attract more institutional investors to the French company.

articles.title: Russia’s parliament to hold final readings on crypto bill Tuesday
articles.description: Russia’s State Duma is set to consider the crypto regulation bill in second and third readings, with rules for investors and cross-border payments included.

articles.title: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
articles.description: Grayscale plans to establish regular cash distributions from staking rewards generated by its Ether and Solana exchange-traded products.

articles.title: Crypto market slips even as equities advance. Pump surges on social-media chatter
articles.description: With a Fear and Greed index pointing solidly at "fear," crypto prices drifted lower even as stock index futures rose. PUMP's 20% surge was the only real headline in an otherwise quiet session.
